• Bus, train and ferry
  • Service announcements

Planned rail closures

To get Auckland's rail network ready for the opening of the City Rail Link (CRL), KiwiRail is carrying out critical maintenance and upgrade work across the network. During these closures, rail replacement buses will operate. Check AT Mobile or the journey planner before you travel.

Current closures

Eastern Line

  • Partial closure between Ōtāhuhu and Manukau from Monday 29 June to Friday 3 July. Trains continue to run between Waitematā and Ōtāhuhu.

July 2026

Southern Line

  • Partial closure until 12pm between Waitematā and Newmarket on Saturday 4 July. Rail buses replace trains.
  • Full closure from Thursday 9 to Sunday 12 July. Rail buses replace trains between Waitematā and Pukekohe.
  • Partial closure until 12pm between Waitematā and Newmarket on Saturday 25 July.

Western Line

  • Partial closure until 12pm between Waitematā and Kingsland on Saturday 4 July.
  • Full closure from Thursday 9 to Sunday 12 July. Rail buses replace trains between Waitematā and Swanson.

Onehunga Line

  • Full closure from Thursday 9 to Sunday 12 July.

August 2026

All lines

  • Full closure of the entire rail network from Saturday 15 to Sunday 16 August for City Rail Link testing. Rail buses replace trains on all lines.

Christmas and New Year closure

The rail network will have a full closure from Friday 26 December 2026 to Sunday 11 January 2027 on all lines for the annual summer maintenance programme.

Later in January

Southern Line

  • Full closure on 17 and 18 January between Puhinui and Papakura.

More information

For details of the Rail Network Rebuild programme, see the Rail network rebuild page.

Auckland Transport
